title: limnanthes douglasii subsp. striata
intro: Limnanthes douglasii subsp. striata, also known as the meadowfoam, is a flowering plant that belongs to the limnanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations, wounds, and minor cuts, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
